'''âw-zh-th''' ('''kawazhath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flighten|flighten]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-zh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flighten|flighten]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-zh-th
|-
! Lemma
| kawazhath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwazhath|thiwazhath]] || [[word:jiwazhath|jiwazhath]] || [[word:shiwazhath|shiwazhath]] || [[word:kiwazhath|kiwazhath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwazhath|thuthuwazhath]] || [[word:jujuwazhath|jujuwazhath]] || [[word:shushuwazhath|shushuwazhath]] || [[word:kukuwazhath|kukuwazhath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwazhath|thuwazhath]] || [[word:juwazhath|juwazhath]] || [[word:shuwazhath|shuwazhath]] || [[word:kuwazhath|kuwazhath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwazhath|thuwazhath]] || [[word:juwazhath|juwazhath]] || [[word:shuwazhath|shuwazhath]] || [[word:kuwazhath|kuwazhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewazhath|thewazhath]] || [[word:jewazhath|jewazhath]] || [[word:shewazhath|shewazhath]] || [[word:kewazhath|kewazhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowazhath|thothowazhath]] || [[word:jojowazhath|jojowazhath]] || [[word:shoshowazhath|shoshowazhath]] || [[word:kokowazhath|kokowazhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowazhath|thowazhath]] || [[word:jowazhath|jowazhath]] || [[word:showazhath|showazhath]] || [[word:kowazhath|kowazhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowazhath|thowazhath]] || [[word:jowazhath|jowazhath]] || [[word:showazhath|showazhath]] || [[word:kowazhath|kowazhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwazhath|thĂŠwazhath]] || [[word:jĂŠwazhath|jĂŠwazhath]] || [[word:shĂŠwazhath|shĂŠwazhath]] || [[word:kĂŠwazhath|kĂŠwazhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawazhath|thathawazhath]] || [[word:jajawazhath|jajawazhath]] || [[word:shashawazhath|shashawazhath]] || [[word:kakawazhath|kakawazhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawazhath|thawazhath]] || [[word:jawazhath|jawazhath]] || [[word:shawazhath|shawazhath]] || [[word:kawazhath|kawazhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawazhath|thawazhath]] || [[word:jawazhath|jawazhath]] || [[word:shawazhath|shawazhath]] || [[word:kawazhath|kawazhath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawazhath|shawazhath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawazhath|goshawazhath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawazhath|gokishawazhath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawazhathnĂŒ|shawazhathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawazhathnknĂŒ|goshawazhathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazhathnĂŒ|gokishawazhathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawazhathshĂ«|shawazhathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawazhathnkshĂ«|goshawazhathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawazhathshĂ«|gokishawazhathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazhathro|shawazhathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazhathnkro|goshawazhathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazhathro|gokishawazhathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazhathmu|shawazhathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazhathnkmu|goshawazhathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazhathmu|gokishawazhathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawazhathsher|shawazhathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawazhathnksher|goshawazhathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawazhathsher|gokishawazhathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawazhathng|shawazhathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawazhathnkng|goshawazhathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawazhathng|gokishawazhathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawazhathya|shawazhathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawazhathnkya|goshawazhathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawazhathya|gokishawazhathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawazhathyam|shawazhathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawazhathnkyam|goshawazhathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawazhathyam|gokishawazhathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawazhathnĂŒshĂ«|shawazhathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawazhathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawazhathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawazhathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawazhathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazhathnĂŒro|shawazhathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazhathnknĂŒro|goshawazhathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazhathnĂŒro|gokishawazhathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazhathnĂŒmu|shawazhathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazhathnknĂŒmu|goshawazhathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazhathnĂŒmu|gokishawazhathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawazhathshĂ«nĂŒ|shawazhathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawazhathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawazhathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazhathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawazhathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazhathshĂ«ro|shawazhathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazhathnkshĂ«ro|goshawazhathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazhathshĂ«ro|gokishawazhathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazhathshĂ«mu|shawazhathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazhathnkshĂ«mu|goshawazhathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazhathshĂ«mu|gokishawazhathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawazhathronĂŒ|shawazhathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawazhathnkronĂŒ|goshawazhathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazhathronĂŒ|gokishawazhathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawazhathroshĂ«|shawazhathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawazhathnkroshĂ«|goshawazhathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawazhathroshĂ«|gokishawazhathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawazhathromu|shawazhathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawazhathnkromu|goshawazhathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawazhathromu|gokishawazhathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawazhathmunĂŒ|shawazhathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawazhathnkmunĂŒ|goshawazhathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawazhathmunĂŒ|gokishawazhathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawazhathmushĂ«|shawazhathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawazhathnkmushĂ«|goshawazhathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawazhathmushĂ«|gokishawazhathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawazhathmuro|shawazhathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawazhathnkmuro|goshawazhathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawazhathmuro|gokishawazhathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
